aliases: where regin logs its own operations
tail and grep the activity log
blurb: Inspecting or extending regin's own ops history — activity log, structured logging, or the dashboard audit trail
intent: Map regin's self-observability stack — distinct from `lib/trace/` session traces. `lib/activity_log.py` writes one rotating `feature`-tagged JSONL stream (read=DEBUG / write=INFO discipline, secret-key auto-redaction), surfaced from the terminal via the `regin logs` group (list / tail / grep / prune / path). `lib/logging_setup.py` bootstraps structlog so Flask/SQLAlchemy/lib all emit into one pipeline with console vs. JSON rendering modes. `lib/audit.py` records who changed what in the web dashboard (best-effort, never blocks, routed through AuthSessionLocal). Use this when diagnosing regin's behaviour, not an agent session.
label: Ops observability: activity log, structured logging & audit trail (regin's own operations history vs. session traces)
